story_title: Implement media rendering for outgoing and incoming messages

questions.question: Does MediaAttachments component correctly render outgoing messages with local blob preview?
questions.actionable_check: Run MediaAttachments.test.ts and verify 'outgoing message with local blob preview' test suite passes. Check that local-blob: URLs trigger IPC resolution via blobStorage.getBlob().
evidence_required: Code in MediaAttachments.tsx showing useEffect that calls window.api.blobStorage?.getBlob()
questions.pass_criteria: Test suite 'outgoing message with local blob preview (AC-028)' passes with both tests green

questions.question: Does MediaAttachments display upload progress bar with correct percentage?
questions.actionable_check: Verify MediaAttachments.tsx renders progress bar when isUploading is true and uploadProgress exists. Check calculation: Math.round(uploadProgress.progress * 100).
evidence_required: MediaAttachments.tsx lines 139-156 showing progress bar rendering
questions.pass_criteria: Progress bar renders with width style based on uploadProgress.progress, updates smoothly as upload progresses

questions.question: Does error state show retry button and call onRetry when clicked?
questions.actionable_check: Run MediaAttachments.test.ts 'error state with retry (AC-029)' suite. Verify retry button renders when messageStatus='error' and onRetry callback is provided.
evidence_required: MediaAttachments.tsx lines 122-136 showing retry button logic
questions.pass_criteria: Error state tests pass, retry button visible only when status='error' AND onRetry exists

questions.question: Does incoming media parsing support both NIP-94 imeta and NIP-92 url tags?
questions.actionable_check: Run media-parser.test.ts and verify 'NIP-92 backward compatibility (AC-050)' tests pass. Check parseIncomingMedia() prefers imeta over url tags.
questions.pass_criteria: Both NIP-94 and NIP-92 parsing tests pass, imeta tags take precedence when both present

questions.question: Does blurhash placeholder render while incoming images are loading?
questions.actionable_check: Verify BlurhashPlaceholder component in MediaAttachments.tsx uses blurhash decode library. Check AC-032 test for blurhash rendering logic.
questions.pass_criteria: Blurhash placeholder renders canvas with decoded blurhash when displayUrl is unavailable

questions.question: Does click-to-expand lightbox work for image attachments?
questions.actionable_check: Check Lightbox component in MediaAttachments.tsx (lines 360-398). Verify it renders when lightboxUrl is set, closes on Escape key or click.
evidence_required: Keyboard event listener for Escape key
questions.pass_criteria: Lightbox renders full-screen overlay with image, closes via click or Escape

questions.question: Does MessageBubble in main.tsx integrate MediaAttachments with all required props?
questions.actionable_check: Read main.tsx MessageBubble function (around line 942-951). Verify MediaAttachments receives mediaJson, messageId, messageStatus, isOwn, uploadProgress, onRetry.
questions.pass_criteria: MessageBubble passes all required props to MediaAttachments when message.mediaJson exists

questions.question: Does useUploadProgress hook correctly aggregate per-message progress from IPC events?
questions.actionable_check: Read useUploadProgress.ts. Verify it listens to window.api.nostling?.media?.onUploadProgress, groups by messageId, calculates overall progress.
evidence_required: Progress calculation: uploadedBytes / totalBytes across all blobs
questions.pass_criteria: Hook returns Map<messageId, MessageUploadProgress> with correct per-message aggregation

questions.question: Does CachedImage component handle both local file:// URLs and remote HTTPS URLs?
questions.actionable_check: Check CachedImage.tsx implementation. Verify it can render both local file paths (file:// scheme) from blob storage and remote URLs from incoming messages.
evidence_required: Usage in MediaAttachments for both local and remote URLs
questions.pass_criteria: CachedImage successfully renders images from file:// and https:// schemes

mandatory_questions.question: Is there any dead code introduced by this story?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Search MediaAttachments/, media-parser.ts, useUploadProgress.ts for unused functions, classes, imports. Check if all exported functions are actually used.
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No unused code in story scope

mandatory_questions.question: Are there any duplicate implementations?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check if media parsing logic exists elsewhere, if blurhash rendering is duplicated, if upload progress tracking has multiple implementations.

mandatory_questions.question: Do integration tests validate the story's workflow?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Verify MediaAttachments.test.ts covers the complete workflow: local blob → upload progress → remote URL → display. Check for integration test covering full message flow.
evidence_required: Test coverage for state transitions (queued → uploading → sent)
Test for incoming message rendering with imeta/url tags
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: At least one integration test covers the happy path end-to-end for both outgoing and incoming media

mandatory_questions.question: Does every item in scope.includes have corresponding implementation AND verification?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Enumerate scope.includes items from story spec. For each item, find implementation in MediaAttachments.tsx/media-parser.ts/useUploadProgress.ts and corresponding test or VQ.
evidence_required: Scope items list from story spec
Test or VQ verifying each item
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All 12 scope.includes items have implementation + test/VQ coverage

mandatory_questions.question: Do all cross-story data flows have unbroken paths from source through intermediaries to destination?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check upload pipeline (Story 07) → media rendering (Story 09). Verify UploadPipelineService sends progress events → main process forwards → preload exposes → useUploadProgress consumes → MediaAttachments renders.
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: Upload progress flows from UploadPipelineService → IPC → renderer hook → UI component without breaks
